prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 88.8 kg; Height 171.8 cm; BMI 30.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 213mg/dL; 9 months ago 198mg/dL; 6 months ago 194mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 88.2kg; 9 months ago 90.9kg; 6 months ago 89.7kg; 3 months ago 93.8kg; current 88.8kg), Height (12 months ago 171.8cm; 9 months ago 171.8cm; 6 months ago 171.8cm; 3 months ago 171.8cm; current 171.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 30.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 37U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 32U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 65mg/g; 9 months ago 66mg/g; 6 months ago 95mg/g; 3 months ago 68mg/g; current 76mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 35mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 128mg/dL; 9 months ago 127mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 123mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.1g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 14.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
